name: Aquavit
recipeInstructions:
1. Crack the caraway seeds slightly in a mortar for a few minutes.
2. Add the cracked seeds to the vodka.
3. Shake well to combine.
4. Let the mixture stand in a warm but not hot area for two weeks.
5. Strain the mixture through cheesecloth.
6. If any seed particles remain, strain again through filter paper.
7. The resulting aquavit will have a slightly brownish color due to using caraway seeds instead of oil of caraway.
This recipe is made regularly and my husband enjoys it.
